shownotes: KGLW.net Staff Notes: The setlist for this show is likely incomplete. People-Vultures was confirmed via audio/video recordings and the remaining songs were confirmed via contemporaneous discussions through various social media, but any additional setlist notations that require audio confirmation (guest appearances, segues, quotes or teases) may be incomplete. If anyone has any further information or, ideally, a complete or conclusive recording please contact KGLW.net staff at setlists@kglw.net.
